title: Style Decision
description: Locked visual style parameters for the comic-story pipeline. Produced by style-pick stage, consumed by all downstream stages.

mode.description: How the style was chosen: preset name, reference image(s), or reference video

preset_name.description: Name of the selected preset (only when mode=preset)

style_lock.description: Locked style keywords appended to every Seedream prompt. Immutable after style-pick.

image_prompt_prefix.description: Natural language style prefix prepended to every image generation prompt

image_negative_prompt.description: Negative prompt keywords to exclude from all image generation

consistency_anchors.description: Consistency rules for maintaining visual coherence across panels

reference_analysis.description: Extracted style parameters from reference images or video

source_paths.description: Paths to reference images or extracted video frames

test_render_path.description: Path to the style test image generated for user confirmation

video_analysis_brief.description: 5-dimension structured analysis from video reference (from EP_STATE.reference_video_analysis)

custom_preset_saved_as.description: Name under which this style was saved as a custom preset (if saved)
